//: Browser-flavored Eclipse Theia app bundled into jean-dockerized. Built in a
//build: Dockerfile stage (yarn theia build) and run headless next to jean. Reached
//reach: through the existing preview proxy at https://<THEIA_PORT>.<preview-wildcard>
//auth: - never exposed on its own host port. Theia ships no auth; the preview
//gate: basic-auth (fails closed without PREVIEW_PASSWORD) is the lock.
//versions: Every @theia/* is pinned to ONE exact version. With `latest`, packages
//versions2: resolve to mismatched versions (e.g. abandoned @theia/git stuck at 1.60.2,
//versions3: @theia/preview at 1.72.3), which nest their own older @theia/core. Multiple
//versions5: => the frontend crashes 'The configuration is not set'. Dropped @theia/git
//versions6: and @theia/preview: neither publishes 1.73.0 (git is discontinued). Git is
//versions7: available at runtime via the bundled vscode git extension from Open VSX.
//test: @theia/test arrives transitively and the generator auto-wires it into src-gen; listed explicitly so `yarn install --production` keeps it and the runtime require doesn't dangle.
//react: react/react-dom are PEER deps of @theia/core (^18.3.1 || ^19), so the app must provide them. With `latest` they used to arrive transitively via mismatched packages; once everything is pinned they must be explicit or webpack fails: Can't resolve 'react'.
//webpack: webpack.config.js forces Theia's stable default webpack pipeline (the
//webpack2: config-less default is the newer esbuild pipeline). terser-webpack-plugin
//webpack3: is the webpack-only minifier, no longer pulled transitively by @theia/cli.
//plugins: Left empty on purpose: language support / extensions are installed at
//runtime: runtime from Open VSX via the built-in @theia/vsx-registry view, so the
//why: image is not pinned to a frozen, soon-stale builtin VSIX set.
